prerequisites: An EmailOctopus API key generated from the account's API keys screen. The key is shown only once at creation, so copy or download it immediately.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: EmailOctopus authenticates every request with an API key. Provide the key in the connector's required api_key field. The API requires a valid key on all requests, and the v2 API sends it as an Authorization: Bearer {key} header over HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key in EmailOctopus
setupSteps.body: Sign in to EmailOctopus and open the API keys screen at https://dashboard.emailoctopus.com/developer/api-keys. Click Add key, give the key a name, then click Create. The key is displayed only once at creation, so copy it or download the CSV before leaving the page.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated API key in the required api_key field. This is the only configuration field, and it is stored as a secret. All EmailOctopus API requests must be made over HTTPS using this key.

sources.title: EmailOctopus v2 API (authentication and rate limiting)
How to create and delete API keys - EmailOctopus knowledge base
